name: app-teams-files
description: The org-owned uploads reference app (#284, the UI proof for #250 / epic #255). A React app on the memory adapter (zero DB) running vike-auth's DEFAULT user guard plus vike-teams. vike-storage is bound to the ORGANIZATION owner (storageOwner: { table: 'organizations', column: 'organization_id' }) instead of the individual user, so an upload belongs to the whole org: any member sees and can delete any member's file. The single-subject default path (no storageOwner) stays byte-for-byte unchanged. Demonstrates the owner-arity axis (#250), orthogonal to the guard axis the two-audience app demonstrates (#278).
